senses.definition: a mechanical tool or an electronic device that is useful for doing something

examples.x: John’s new kitchen gadget can chop vegetables in seconds, making meal prep much easier.
The smartwatch is a handy gadget that tracks your fitness and keeps you connected on the go.
Sarah’s favorite gadget is her noise-canceling headphones, which help her focus while working.
The mechanic used a specialized gadget to diagnose the issue with the car’s engine.
This multi-tool gadget includes a knife, screwdriver, and bottle opener, perfect for camping trips.

senses.definition: a portable electronic gadet that can connect to the internet, such as a laptop, smartphone, etc.

examples.x: She used her device to join the virtual meeting from a remote location.
Many students now rely on a device like a tablet or laptop to complete their homework and research online.
He downloaded a new fitness app on his device to track his daily workouts.
The restaurant provided free Wi-Fi so customers could easily connect their devices to the internet.
As she traveled through different countries, her smartphone was the most important device for navigation and communication.

senses.definition: (of an object) powered by machinery or an engine

examples.x: The mechanical clock chimes every hour, driven by gears and springs.
The mechanical door lock uses a key to engage tumblers and secure the door.
The mechanical crane lifts heavy loads using a system of pulleys and cables.
The mechanical lawnmower relies on a gasoline engine to power its blades and propel itself across the lawn.

senses.definition: (of a device) having very small parts such as chips and obtaining power from electricity

examples.x: She prefers reading e-books on her electronic tablet rather than carrying around physical books.
The company upgraded its security system with advanced electronic locks and surveillance cameras.
He spends hours each day playing games on his electronic gaming console.

senses.definition: (of an idea, object, etc.) unique and working very well which has resulted from creativity and clever thinking

examples.x: The engineer's ingenious design for the bridge combined both aesthetic beauty and structural integrity.
The student came up with an ingenious solution to the complex math problem that impressed the entire class.
The new smartphone app offers an ingenious way to organize and track your daily tasks.
Her ingenious idea for a solar-powered water heater won first prize at the science fair.
The architect's ingenious use of space made the small apartment feel much larger and more comfortable.

senses.definition: (of computer software) easily learnt and understood, therefore making usage simpler

examples.x: The new smartphone features an intuitive interface that makes it easy for users to navigate and find what they need.
The graphic design software has an intuitive layout, allowing artists to create stunning digital artwork without a steep learning curve.
The fitness app's intuitive tracking system helps users monitor their exercise routines and progress effortlessly.
The online shopping platform has an intuitive checkout process, making it simple for customers to complete their purchases quickly and easily.

senses.definition: occurred, created, or updated most recently in time

examples.x: The company released its latest smartphone model with advanced features.
She purchased the latest fashion trends for the upcoming season.
The scientist presented findings from their latest research project.
She’s reading the latest book from her favorite author.
The latest update to the software fixed several bugs.
His latest film has received critical acclaim worldwide.

senses.definition: outdated and gone out of style, often replaced by more current trends or advancements

examples.x: The flip phone has become obsolete in an era dominated by smartphones.
The design of the car felt obsolete compared to the sleek, modern models on the market.
Some traditional farming methods are considered obsolete with the advent of modern technology.
Her obsolete clothing style reminded everyone of past fashion eras.
Many obsolete technologies can still be found in antique shops.

senses.definition: no longer matching the current trends or standards because of being too old

examples.x: His outdated smartphone, lacking modern features and capabilities, struggled to keep up with the latest apps and software updates.
Her outdated wardrobe, filled with clothes from past decades, needed an update to reflect current fashion trends.
Teachers are encouraged to avoid outdated teaching methods that don’t engage modern students.
Her outdated training methods have been replaced by techniques backed by recent research.
The company replaced its outdated machinery with newer, faster models.
With the rise of streaming, DVDs are often considered outdated by most consumers.

senses.definition: new and unlike anything else

examples.x: Her novel approach to problem-solving impressed the entire team with its creativity and effectiveness.
The scientist's research findings presented a novel perspective on the origins of the universe.
The artist's latest exhibition showcased a series of novel techniques and styles that captivated viewers.
The architect's design for the new building featured a novel use of sustainable materials and energy-efficient technology.
He came up with a novel strategy to improve sales.

senses.definition: to supply with the needed energy to make something work

examples.x: Solar panels are used to power many homes in the neighborhood, reducing reliance on fossil fuels.
The battery in my laptop can power it for up to 10 hours on a single charge.
Wind turbines power the entire town, providing a sustainable energy source.
The generator was used to power the lights during the power outage.
Electric cars are powered by rechargeable batteries, making them an eco-friendly transportation option.

senses.definition: to fill an electronic device with energy

examples.x: He forgot to charge his laptop overnight, so it ran out of battery during his presentation.
The solar panels on the roof charge the batteries during the day, providing power for the house at night.
The portable power bank is convenient for charging devices on the go when access to electrical outlets is limited.
She charged her phone before leaving the house.

senses.definition: to refill an electronic device with energy

examples.x: She needs to recharge her phone before going out.
He recharges his laptop overnight to ensure it's ready for work.
They recharge the batteries in their camera before the trip.
She recharges her smartwatch every night to track her sleep.
They recharge the portable power bank to have a backup power source.

senses.definition: to gradually or completely use up the available resources

examples.x: The extended drought drained the reservoirs of water.
The ongoing project has been draining the company's finances.
The constant use of electronic devices drained the battery of her smartphone by the end of the day.
The excessive demands of the job were draining her energy and affecting her overall well-being.
The prolonged illness drained her savings, leaving her in a financially difficult situation.

senses.definition: to start a computer, typically involves setting up hardware elements to prepare the computer for use

examples.x: She booted her laptop, eager to dive into her latest writing project.
They booted the computer, preparing for a long night of gaming.
He booted his laptop, ready to tackle the day's programming assignments.
We booted the laptop, excited to watch the latest movie release.
The technician booted the computer, troubleshooting the network connectivity issue.

senses.definition: (of an electronic device or machine) to start working

examples.x: She started up her laptop to check her emails.
The mechanic started up the engine after repairing it.
The engineer started up the newly installed machinery in the factory.
They started up the air conditioner to cool down the room.
The IT specialist started up the server to troubleshoot the issue.

senses.definition: to make something stop working

examples.x: She had to shut down the noisy machine to hear the phone call.
The technician had to shut down the entire system for maintenance.
She had to shut down her laptop because it was running too slowly.
The IT department will shut down the servers for maintenance tonight.

senses.definition: to make something more useful or modern by adding the most recent information to it, improving its faults, or making new features available for it

examples.x: She decided to update her resume with her most recent job experience.
They needed to update the kitchen appliances to match the modern decor.
The website undergoes regular maintenance to update its content and improve user experience.
I updated my calendar with the latest meeting times and events.
The article was updated to include new research findings.

senses.definition: an object that turns chemical energy to electricity to give power to a device or machine

examples.x: The flashlight wouldn't turn on because the battery was dead.
She replaced the old battery in her watch with a new one.
The electric car's battery allows it to travel long distances without emissions.
He always carries spare batteries for his camera during outdoor adventures.

senses.definition: the quantity that is possible by a machine, etc. to produce

examples.x: The capacity of the factory increased with the installation of new machinery.
The city's transportation system was overburdened, exceeding its capacity during rush hour.
The company invested in expanding its production capacity to meet growing demand.
The capacity of the team to innovate led to breakthroughs in technology.

senses.definition: a series of electrical or radio waves carrying data to a radio, television station, or mobile phone

examples.x: The satellite transmits a signal to the television station, allowing live broadcasts to be aired.
My mobile phone lost signal in the remote area, making it impossible to make calls.
The radio picked up a weak signal from a distant station, resulting in static-filled audio.
Engineers worked to boost the signal strength to ensure clear communication during the event.
The Wi-Fi router sends a signal to all connected devices, providing internet access throughout the house.

senses.definition: a class or step of technological development

examples.x: The latest generation of smartphones features enhanced camera capabilities and longer battery life.
Scientists are working on developing a new generation of renewable energy technologies to combat climate change.
With each generation of gaming consoles, players experience improved graphics and more advanced gaming capabilities.
The automobile industry is transitioning towards producing electric vehicles as the next generation of eco-friendly transportation.

senses.definition: the occurrence of a program that is being run by an operating system

examples.x: The operating system efficiently manages multiple processes simultaneously, ensuring each one operates independently without interference.
System administrators monitor the resource usage of each process to optimize system performance and prevent bottlenecks.
In a multitasking environment, the operating system allocates resources dynamically among various processes based on priority and demand.

senses.definition: a device that can refill a battery with electrical energy

examples.x: I always carry a portable charger to ensure my phone doesn’t run out of battery during long trips.
The new wireless charger makes it easy to power up my devices without dealing with cables.
She forgot her laptop charger at home, so she had to borrow one from a colleague.
The electric car comes with a fast charger that can refill the battery in just a few hours.
He plugged his tablet into the charger before going to bed, so it would be fully charged by morning.

senses.definition: a group of wires bundled together for transmitting electricity that is protected within a rubber case

examples.x: The electrician installed a new cable to ensure a stable power supply to the building.
She tripped over the cable running across the floor, which was connected to the power strip.
The charging cable for my phone is frayed and needs to be replaced.
They used a heavy-duty cable to connect the generator to the main power grid.
The technician checked the cable connections to troubleshoot the electrical issue.

senses.definition: a piece of electronic object in a computer where data is stored

examples.x: The computer’s memory was upgraded to 16GB to improve its performance and speed.
He saved the document to the computer’s memory to ensure it wouldn’t be lost.
The laptop’s memory was almost full, so she had to delete some files to free up space.
Installing additional memory can help your computer run multiple applications more smoothly.
The technician replaced the faulty memory module to fix the computer’s booting issue.

senses.definition: the visual data shown on a smartphone or computer monitor or display

examples.x: Scrolling down the page reveals a lengthy screen of text.
Swiping left or right navigates through different screens of the app.
Accessing the settings menu allows customization of the home screen.

senses.definition: a piece of equipment by which a machine is operated

examples.x: The drone’s controller allows the pilot to navigate it smoothly through the air.
The factory’s machinery is operated using a central controller that manages all the processes.
She adjusted the settings on the air conditioner controller to cool the room.
The remote controller for the TV was missing, so they had to change channels manually.

senses.definition: a flat screen with the controls of a machine or device on it

examples.x: The control panel of the washing machine allows you to select different wash cycles and settings.
The pilot used the control panel to monitor and adjust the aircraft’s systems during the flight.
The technician accessed the control panel to troubleshoot and fix the issue with the HVAC system.
The smart home system has a central control panel where you can manage all connected devices.
The factory’s control panel displays real-time data and allows operators to control the production line.

senses.definition: an instrument that makes looking at tiny objects or organisms possible by enlarging them which is useful in scientific studies

examples.x: The scientist used a microscope to examine the structure of the bacteria in the sample.
Under the microscope, the tiny details of the insect’s wings became clearly visible.
The biology class spent the afternoon looking at plant cells through the microscope.
Researchers rely on powerful microscopes to study viruses and other microscopic organisms.
She adjusted the focus on the microscope to get a clearer view of the tissue sample.

senses.definition: a glassy object that is capable of making small objects seem larger

examples.x: The detective used a magnifying glass to examine the tiny clues left at the crime scene.
She held the magnifying glass over the map to read the small print more easily.
The children were fascinated by the magnifying glass, using it to look at insects in the garden.
He used a magnifying glass to inspect the fine details of the antique watch.
The jeweler relied on a magnifying glass to appraise the intricate designs on the ring.

senses.definition: a device with a needle that always points to the north, used to find direction

examples.x: The hiker used a compass to navigate through the dense forest and stay on the right path.
Sailors have relied on the compass for centuries to find their way across the open seas.
She checked the compass to ensure they were heading north towards the mountain base camp.
The explorer always carried a compass in his backpack for his adventurous journeys.
In the absence of GPS, the compass became an essential tool for the outdoor survival course.

senses.definition: a flying vehicle such as an aircraft that is controlled from afar and has no pilot

examples.x: The photographer used a drone to capture stunning aerial shots of the landscape.
Drones are often used in agriculture to monitor crop health and manage fields efficiently.
The delivery company is testing drones to quickly transport packages to customers in remote areas.
During the search and rescue mission, drones provided crucial aerial views of the disaster zone.
Hobbyists enjoy flying drones in open spaces, practicing maneuvers and capturing videos from above.

senses.definition: having the latest and most advanced features or design

examples.x: The cutting-edge medical device uses nanotechnology to deliver targeted treatments with unprecedented precision.
Their cutting-edge research in renewable energy aims to develop more efficient solar panels and energy storage solutions.
The cutting-edge virtual reality headset offers immersive gaming experiences and realistic simulations.
The cutting-edge architecture of the building features sustainable design elements and smart technology for energy efficiency.
The cutting-edge laboratory equipment enables scientists to conduct groundbreaking experiments and analyze data with unparalleled accuracy.

senses.definition: in a state of not operating or no longer functioning, especially of electrical devices
a display by which the user can interact with a computer, smartphone, etc. by touching its surface

examples.x: The phone has a responsive touchscreen for easy navigation.
She swiped the touchscreen to unlock her device.
The touchscreen on the tablet is much larger than on the phone.
They use a touchscreen at the kiosk to place orders.
The touchscreen allows for quick and intuitive control.
